name: showcase3
_comment: Slice AZ third material — exercises the NEW node types (Swizzle/MakeFloat3/Power/Saturate/OneMinus) that the AV/AW MVP lacked. This CLOSES the AW swizzle gap: a float4 TextureSample now drives the SCALAR metallic/roughness ports via a component-extract Swizzle. Graph: TextureSample(checker) -> {Swizzle 'x' -> metallic, Swizzle 'y' -> OneMinus -> roughness, Swizzle 'z' -> baseColor.y}. baseColor = MakeFloat3( Saturate(Power(Fresnel(power=2), 3)) [a rim highlight clamped to 0..1], the checker blue channel, a constant 0.4 ). On Vulkan this renders via the RUNTIME compile path AND a build-time .spv; on Metal via the committed build-time codegen (shaders/generated/mat_showcase3.frag.hlsl). All math is shared between the CPU interpreter and the HLSL codegen.
